headline: Gold Flat Amid 2% Weekly Gain on Rate Outlook

headline: Fed's Inflation Anchor Faces 3rd Supply Shock Test

article.title: Fed’s Barkin Says Repeated Supply Shocks Test Inflation Anchor
article.summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond President Tom Barkin said the ability of businesses and consumers to tolerate the latest in a series of supply shocks will determine whether the US central bank can continue to “look through” higher inflation without raising interest rates.
